situational_context: Running comeback Day 59 (13 runs since May 3, 2026). ACWR 0.72 — below 0.8 safe zone, detraining risk from a quiet recent week after Run #12 overshoot (7.5 km, suffer 36, June 21) was absorbed. Readiness signals are the best in weeks: HRV BALANCED (first time since June 24), training readiness 91, body battery 61. Run #13 (3.5 km, suffer 13, June 28) was appropriately conservative. VO2max running improved to 41.1 (from 40.6 at June 14 state). Weight 103.67 kg with favorable recomposition (+1.16 kg muscle, -0.17 kg fat vs June 7). HRV 7d avg stable at 35 ms — still below 37 target but overnight reading BALANCED. Sleep excellent (8.11h 7d avg). E-bike commuting remains primary modality (2 round trips since last state). Protein intake averaging 107g/day vs 150g target — persistent deficit. Vitamin D retest now overdue (July 2026 target reached). No new labs since Dec 2025. Baby (Léonie, 18 months) — cohabitant data unavailable this run.

recommendations.text: ACWR at 0.72 (below 0.8 safe zone) — execute Run #14 today to begin rebuilding acute load. Maintain 3 structured sessions this week (Wed run, Sat gravel/ebike, Sun run) plus commute days to project ACWR toward 0.8+ by next week.

Protein intake averaging 107g/day vs 150g target (71% adherence). At 103.67 kg during running comeback with muscle-gain trajectory, aim for >= 1.4 g/kg = 145g/day. Add a protein-rich snack or shake to close the gap.
recommendations.measurable: Average daily protein >= 140g over next 7 days

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest overdue (due July 2026 per P2 from June 14). Last measured 27 ng/mL (Dec 2025, insufficient). Schedule blood panel this week to confirm supplementation is raising levels toward 40 ng/mL target.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains below 0.8 for more than 7 additional days after resuming structured training
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.72; need to rebuild acute load to exit detraining zone without overshooting past 1.3

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or fails to reach 37 ms by July 15
markers_to_watch.reason: Persistent at 35 ms for 3+ weeks despite improving overnight readings; today's BALANCED is encouraging

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance bottleneck at 103.67 kg body weight; Run #12 overshoot (7.5 km) was 10 days ago
